Operation 'getKeyword' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Original summary 'Get a single keyword' is generic and doesn't specify the lookup method. Description lacks detail about what data is returned, making it difficult for AI agents to understand the response structure. Enhanced summary clarifies the ID-based lookup, and improved description specifies the return type (Keyword object) and hints at key fields returned, improving AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Retrieve a single keyword by its OpenAlex ID.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve keyword details by OpenAlex ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve detailed information for a single keyword using its OpenAlex ID. Returns a Keyword object containing metadata such as keyword display name, concept associations, and usage metrics.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Get a single keyword' is generic and doesn't specify the lookup method. Description lacks detail about what data is returned, making it difficult for AI agents to understand the response structure. Enhanced summary clarifies the ID-based lookup, and improved description specifies the return type (Keyword object) and hints at key fields returned, improving AI agent interpretability.
